title: Nested Signal
story: [Meridian-7 Log #018] rEx sent an instruction sequence — nested structures in function call format. send(42), decode("signal"), process(100)... Is rEx telling you what to do? Or testing whether you can execute its commands? First, accurately parse all valid instructions.
hints: [Hint] Function names start with a letter
[Hint] Parentheses can contain zero or more arguments
[Hint] Arguments can be numbers or quoted strings
promptHints: Describe the structure of a function call: name + parentheses + arguments
Tell the AI the argument list can be empty
Use few-shot examples to help AI understand the format

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] Function calls identified. Nested structures are being parsed.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Nested parsing failed. Function call structure needs a more precise description.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Perfect nested parsing. Your instructions are becoming increasingly structured.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual nested parsing. Complex structures are no challenge for you.
